title: Panamax and Handymax Fleet Growth
summary:
Main
66 dry bulk vessels were delivered last month. This is 26 more than were delivered in May and marks the largest amount of newbuildings delivered since January 2017. Last month saw the delivery of 8 handysize vessels, 22 handymax vessels, 21 panamax vessels, and 15 capesize vessels.
